title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 104.
content:
There was an Old Person of Sparta,
    Who had twenty-five sons and one daughter;
    He fed them on snails,
    And weighed them in scales,
    That wonderful person of Sparta.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 104."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
